Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 239

GEOL437 Global Climate Change: Past and Present (3 Credits) Introduction to the processes by which climate varies, the paleoclimate record, and projections of climate change into the 21st century, including discussion of climate sensitivity to external radiative forcing. Prerequisite: MATH115 or MATH140; and (GEOL100 or GEOL120); and (CHEM131 or CHEM135); and (CHEM132 or CHEM136).

Cross-listed with: AOSC437.

Credit Only Granted for. AOSC437 or GEOL437.
